title: Civil & Structural Desigjn Engineer Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Ciwise Consultants - Our Operating office is at Ubi Rd. We are an international design and project management firm offering a wide range of professional services in design and consulting in the specialist field of building, infrastructure, micro-tunnelling, underground space, and trenchless technology. It brings together a team of highly specialized professionals with diverse disciplines and strong international experience. Our Strength We emphasize technical excellence in all our work, leveraging integrated multidisciplinary approaches to benefit our clients and projects. Our proven track record covers new builds and existing buildings. We believe our international experience positively impacts projects. We have a strong team of professionally trained specialists for trenchless technology site work supervision, monitoring, and quality implementation on the ground. Technical Excellence We strive to achieve the highest level of technical satisfaction from design to implementation. We invest in technologies and skills to keep our team updated with international trends. Design Culture We foster a conducive working environment that promotes innovative ideas and knowledge sharing. Our team maintains skills and knowledge across a wide spectrum of design. Honest and Ethical Business Practice We highly value honest and ethical business practices at all levels of our team. Our most valuable awards are client feedback recognizing us as an “honest and trusted firm.” Ciwise Consultants values long-term partnerships with a diverse and growing customer base, including public and private stakeholders, government agencies, and educational institutions. Clients include PUB, LTA, NEA, HDB, JTC, Jurong Port, LARSEN & TOUBRO, Italian Thai Development Pty Ltd, JKR Malaysia, MATRADE, Chip Eng Seng Corporation Ltd, China Construction (South Pacific) Development Co Pte Ltd, Gammon, KTC Group, Hock Hai Group, and Good Link Group. Principal Officers Er. Cheng Kim Hua, Principal Engineer Er. Cheng is a registered Professional Engineer in Singapore and Malaysia as an ASEAN PE. He has 49 years of experience in engineering and construction, including planning, design, construction supervision, and business development of civil, infrastructure, trenchless, tunnel works, and structures. His work spans Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, India, and the Middle East. He has served as vice president of the Institution of Engineers, Malaysia, Board Member of the Highway Authority, Malaysia, and the Board of Engineers, Malaysia. He has contributed to the continuing education committee of the PE Board, Singapore, and served as Treasurer of the Singapore Concrete Institute. He is also a Chartered Management Accountant, UK.


Applicants
please submit your application by email to Qpcheng@gmail.com and/or WhatsApp +6594551399, Attn: Er Cheng. Please state your current and expected salary level, and your notice period.

Job Summary

Lead and execute engineering studies and design for civil infrastructure projects, ensuring compliance with authority codes and standards. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and stakeholders to deliver innovative, compliant, and timely engineering solutions.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct comprehensive engineering studies to analyze civil infrastructure project requirements and guide design decisions and project planning
  • Develop civil, structural, infrastructure, and underground engineering designs that comply with current authority codes, standards, and submission requirements
  • Coordinate design activities with Quality Planning Department (QPD), Quality Project Supervision (QPS), clients, and authorities to secure approvals and ensure effective supervision on site
  • Manage and collaborate with internal design disciplines and sub-consultants to produce accurate design calculations, drawings, and technical reports for client and authority submissions
  • Communicate design concepts, alternatives, and technical information clearly and persuasively to clients and approving agencies to facilitate timely design approvals and project progress
  • Apply interpersonal skills to engage effectively with multidisciplinary teams and stakeholders, fostering collaboration and alignment on project objectives
  • Utilize analytical and problem-solving skills to identify and resolve design and project challenges, ensuring solutions meet quality and compliance standards
  • Demonstrate technical competency and project management capabilities to deliver projects within defined scope, schedule, and quality requirements

Required competencies and certifications

  • Possess Registered Engineer (RE) qualifications as mandated by the Professional Engineers Board (PEB) of Singapore
  • Hold a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent, recognized by the Professional Engineers Board (PEB) of Singapore

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Hold additional certifications in data analytics, Building Information Modeling (BIM), or proficiency in relevant design software such as STAAD, Plaxis, Python, and SQL
  • Demonstrate a minimum of 5 years of design experience in civil and infrastructure-related works; 8 years for managerial roles

Principal  Officers


Er.Cheng Kim Hua,David – Principal Engineer


Er. Cheng is a registered Professional engineer in Singapore and Malaysia  as an Aseam PE.

He has been in the engineering / construction works since 1976. A total of 36 years involving in the planning, design, and construction supervision and business development of engineering works including civil and infra and trenchless /Tunnel works/ structures. He has covered countries including Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, India and Middle East


He  served in many professional bodies such as the vice president of the Institution of Engineers, Malaysia, and Board Member of the Highway Authority, Malaysia and the Board of Engineers, Malaysia.He has also served in the continuing Education committee of the PE Board, Singapore and as Treasurer of Singapore Concrete Institute. he is also a Chartered Management Accoutants , UK
